scripts.migrate:up: node-pg-migrate up -d DATABASE_URL_MIGRATIONS -j ts -m packages/db/migrations --envPath .env --tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.migrations.json
scripts.migrate:down: node-pg-migrate down -d DATABASE_URL_MIGRATIONS -j ts -m packages/db/migrations --envPath .env --tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.migrations.json
scripts.dev:all: npx concurrently "pnpm run dev:api:1" "pnpm run dev:worker" "pnpm run dev:ui"
scripts.test:phase4: tsx --env-file=.env apps/api/tests/test-stage25.ts && tsx --env-file=.env apps/api/tests/test-stage26.ts && tsx --env-file=.env apps/api/tests/test-stage27.ts && tsx --env-file=.env apps/api/tests/test-stage28.ts && tsx --env-file=.env apps/api/tests/test-stage29.ts
